message:
test(conformance): add very long segment and word-level boundary fixtures

Closes remaining coverage gaps identified in COVERAGE.md:

- very_long_segment_15min.json: Tests segments exceeding 10 minutes
- word_level_boundary_cases.json: Tests single-character words and punctuation

Updates COVERAGE.md to mark all fixture gaps as resolved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,9 +157,9 @@ See [DISCREPANCIES.md](/DISCREPANCIES.md) for intentional deviations:
 
 ## Gaps and TODOs
 
-- [ ] No fixture for `NaN`/`Infinity` timestamp edge cases (covered by unit tests only)
-- [ ] No fixture for extremely long segments (> 10 minutes)
-- [ ] Word-level timestamp conformance is minimal (`word_timestamps_bridge_native.json`)
+- [x] ~~No fixture for `NaN`/`Infinity` timestamp edge cases~~ → `nonfinite_timestamp_invariants.json` (null proxy; actual NaN/Inf not expressible in JSON)
+- [x] ~~No fixture for extremely long segments (> 10 minutes)~~ → `long_segment_duration.json` (10 min), `very_long_segment_15min.json` (15 min)
+- [x] ~~Word-level timestamp conformance is minimal~~ → `word_level_boundary_cases.json` added (single-char words, punctuation segments)
 
 ## Commands

@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+{
+  "name": "very_long_segment_15min",
+  "tolerance": {
+    "timestamp_tolerance_sec": 0.1,
+    "require_text_exact": true,
+    "require_speaker_exact": false
+  },
+  "policy": {
+    "allow_overlap": false,
+    "epsilon": 0.1
+  },
+  "expected": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.0,
+      "end_sec": 120.0,
+      "text": "Introduction spanning two minutes of continuous speech.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.95
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 120.0,
+      "end_sec": 900.0,
+      "text": "Extended monologue segment covering fifteen minutes total, testing extreme long-form transcription tolerance beyond the ten-minute threshold.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.88
+    }
+  ],
+  "observed": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.02,
+      "end_sec": 120.0,
+      "text": "Introduction spanning two minutes of continuous speech.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.94
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 120.05,
+      "end_sec": 900.0,
+      "text": "Extended monologue segment covering fifteen minutes total, testing extreme long-form transcription tolerance beyond the ten-minute threshold.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.87
+    }
+  ],
+  "expect_within_tolerance": true,
+  "expect_invariants_pass": true,
+  "expected_timestamp_violations": 0,
+  "expected_text_mismatches": 0,
+  "expected_speaker_mismatches": 0
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "name": "word_level_boundary_cases",
+  "tolerance": {
+    "timestamp_tolerance_sec": 0.02,
+    "require_text_exact": true,
+    "require_speaker_exact": false
+  },
+  "policy": {
+    "allow_overlap": false,
+    "epsilon": 0.001
+  },
+  "expected": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.0,
+      "end_sec": 0.1,
+      "text": "I",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.95
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.1,
+      "end_sec": 0.25,
+      "text": "am",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.92
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.25,
+      "end_sec": 0.5,
+      "text": "here",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.88
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.5,
+      "end_sec": 0.52,
+      "text": ".",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.99
+    }
+  ],
+  "observed": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.01,
+      "end_sec": 0.11,
+      "text": "I",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.94
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.11,
+      "end_sec": 0.26,
+      "text": "am",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.91
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.26,
+      "end_sec": 0.51,
+      "text": "here",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.87
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.51,
+      "end_sec": 0.53,
+      "text": ".",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.98
+    }
+  ],
+  "expect_within_tolerance": true,
+  "expect_invariants_pass": true,
+  "expected_timestamp_violations": 0,
+  "expected_text_mismatches": 0,
+  "expected_speaker_mismatches": 0
+}
